title: Gold rallies after low US inflation
section_path: Gold rallies after low US inflation
section_path_text: Gold rallies after low US inflation
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A risk-on tone across markets, triggered by lower inflation data helped boost sentiment. This was aided by a weaker USD, which increased investor appetite in the sector. Image reference: 1699995347123.png | assets/2023-11-15_irw0xzbtihfobjxhfgg00ajgoz5dut_img_1699995347123_aa55fb397cb4.png
Gold rallied after US inflation came in lower than expected.
